title: C95 · The Evidence Graph as the Anti-Score

story.text:
# 💡 C95 · The Evidence Graph as the Anti-Score
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Issuer-attested disclosure — a signed, decomposable evidence graph verified against issuer DIDs — is the structural refusal of the reputation score. Active (~55% · Tome X). Edges → C61, C17.

## Edges out

- *references* → [[the Evidence Graph (never a score)]]

## Edges in

- [[Tome X Act 1: The House of Archon Answers]] *introduces* →
